home.operationsPausedDesc: You won't appear on the map until you resume.

send.title: Send
send.warning: Double-check the address. Blockchain transfers cannot be reversed.
send.scannerUnavailable: Scanner only available in the mobile app. Paste the address instead.
send.cameraPermission: Camera permission denied. Enable it in Settings or paste the address.

receive.title: Receive
receive.subtitle: Share your address to receive funds.
receive.scanTip: Show this QR or copy your address.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and privacy
profile.deleteDesc: This action deletes your account and anonymizes your data. You cannot recover the account after confirming.
profile.deleteWarning: Before continuing, open the confirmation and type your exact username to enable deletion.
profile.importKeyDesc: Paste your Stellar secret key (starts with "S", 56 characters). It will replace the current device key.

cashout.title: Convert to cash
cashout.amountLabel: HOW MUCH CASH DO YOU WANT?
cashout.info: Enter the amount you want to receive. We'll find verified merchants nearby with immediate liquidity.

deposit.title: Buy with cash
deposit.amountLabel: HOW MUCH CASH DO YOU HAVE?
deposit.info: We'll find agents nearby who will give you digital assets in exchange for your cash. Funds are held in escrow until you complete the meetup.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.pollBanner: Notifications are disabled. Inbox updates every 30 seconds.

cetes.title: Tokenized CETES
cetes.subtitle: Mexican Government Bonds · Etherfuse
cetes.willReceiveSpei: You'll receive in your SPEI account
cetes.speiDeposited: MXN deposited to your SPEI account
cetes.connectBank: Connect your bank via SPEI to get started
cetes.footer: CETES tokenized by Etherfuse · Stellar Network · {{network}}
cetes.quoteExpired: The quote has expired. Please request a new one.

map.title: Convert to cash
map.feeExceedsWarning: Total cost exceeds {{maxPct}}%. Compare with another offer before continuing.
map.footerNote: Your balance is held in escrow until you confirm you received the cash. Secure operation protected by MicoPay's smart escrow.
map.locatingAgents: Locating agents available for your amount…
map.enableLocation: Enable location permissions to find agents near you.
map.checkConnection: Check your connection and try again.
map.noAgentsDesc: No nearby agent can handle ${{amount}} MXN right now. Try a different amount or later.

exploreScreen.title: Explore
exploreScreen.subtitle: Discover new ways to use your money
exploreScreen.cetesRateBadge: ~{{rate}}% annual · Backed by the Mexican government
exploreScreen.cetesDesc: Buy tokenized CETES directly from your wallet using XLM, USDC or MXNe. Etherfuse custodies them on-chain — sell anytime and get your pesos via SPEI or back to your wallet.
exploreScreen.blendDesc: Use your CETES or crypto as collateral and get liquidity in seconds — no giving up your assets, no paperwork.
exploreScreen.viewHowMuch: See how much I can borrow
exploreScreen.poweredBy: Powered by Stellar, Etherfuse and Blend
